nasb.text: The waters saw You, O God; The waters saw You, they were in anguish; The deeps also trembled.

esv.text: When the waters saw you, O God, when the waters saw you, they were afraid; indeed, the deep trembled.

cnv.text: 神啊！眾水看見你， 眾水看見你就懼怕， 深淵也都戰抖。

ccb.text: 上帝啊，海水看见你就战栗， 深渊看见你就颤抖。

csbs.text: 神哪，众水看见你， 众水看见你就震撼，连深渊也颤抖！
